name: Rand Paul
subject: this is dangerous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
, Marco Rubio's plans for America are not conservative. They're dangerous. Interventionists like Rubio have never met a war they didn't want to be involved with. He wants to spend money, commit troops, and has little concern with the very real consequences of doing it. I talked a bit about this with Laura Ingraham yesterday afternoon. You can listen [HERE.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31616574:W77IqLyBN:m:1:879035888:91A67CDF9801EF45A78ECAB0C8AC2598:r) [We have to speak up against the harmful policies the Rubios of the party have supported.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31616575:W77IqLyBN:m:1:879035888:91A67CDF9801EF45A78ECAB0C8AC2598:r) A $1 trillion increase in spending in the Middle East? Policies like this have actually made us LESS safe. Just look at Syria, Libya, and Iraq. Under plans like this, we spend more money, go farther into debt, and end up in a worse spot than we started. **How is this conservative?** It is not fiscally responsible at all. It's reckless. It's bad policy. And it hurts America. I support the Reagan policy of Peace Through Strength, and that includes having a strong economy that doesn't go another $2 Trillion in debt. On top of foreign policy plans that puts America at risk, Rubio is also pushing immigration policies that will cost America trillions. With the 'Gang of 8', Rubio drafted one of the largest amnesty plans of our time and fails to secure our border at all. The only thing it does secure, actually, is a trillion dollars in tax credits for illegal aliens who will remain within our country. In fact the Inspector General said that $4 billion of the current tax credits are going to illegal aliens. That's like a 25% fraud rate. This is a real problem. He's actually working with Chuck Schumer to block conservative amendments to his disastrous immigration plan. I introduced an amendment called "Trust But Verify" that would allow Congress to have a say on immigration plans put forward by the president, and vote on border security every year. Rubio and Schumer made a secret deal to shoot down this amendment and all other enforcement plans. When you do things like this, you take power away from the people and grow the size of the government. That is exactly the opposite of what we need to be doing. As Laura Ingraham mentioned in the interview, when you confront Marco on these issues \-- he's stumped. He has no answer. He has no defense. That's because there isn't a good defense for basically aligning himself with Hillary Clinton and supporting the expansion of government. I am going to hold Marco accountable for being Hillary-lite on the critical issues of our day and I am going to keep fighting for a smaller government. [Will you stand with me?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31616575:W77IqLyBN:m:1:879035888:91A67CDF9801EF45A78ECAB0C8AC2598:r) In Liberty, Rand Paul Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

name: Ben Carson
subject: A dangerous trend on our college campuses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31618929:sgNQTrywN:m:1:876315805:0AD263A6642B8893929186B7C0B9963C:r)
---

Peter,

There is a dangerous trend underway on our college campuses, from the University of Missouri to my alma mater of Yale University. Free speech and open dialogue are being trampled.

We are getting to the point where people can say, "I don't like what you're doing. It's offensive," and therefore believe they have the right to be violent or shout people down.

**Not only is this infantile, but it's an affront to the First Amendment.**

But let's not kid ourselves -- this is part of a larger problem in our society.

People are using political correctness as a tool to silence those with whom they disagree, and rather than having an open dialogue to solve our many problems, people get into their respective corners and demonize each other.

**One of the main reasons I'm running for President is to push back against this type of behavior. **

As I said in my closing statement at this week's debate, we can move beyond our current division and despair not by "We the Democrats" or "We the Republicans," but as "We the People" of America working together, and realizing that we are not each other's enemies.

I'm happy to tell you that we've now launched "Students for Carson" chapters on thousands of college campuses across the country. I'm hopeful that in their own small way, they will do their part to "heal, inspire and revive" our great nation.

I appreciate you joining me in this worthy endeavor, and I'm forever grateful for your [generous and ongoing support](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31618929:sgNQTrywN:m:1:876315805:0AD263A6642B8893929186B7C0B9963C:r).

Thank you.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31618930:sgNQTrywN:m:1:876315805:0AD263A6642B8893929186B7C0B9963C:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31618931:sgNQTrywN:m:1:876315805:0AD263A6642B8893929186B7C0B9963C:r)

name: George P. Bush
subject: Is this right, Friend?
body:
Friend - I'll be honest: I've never seen my dad so fired up in this campaign!

He was strong in Tuesday's debate, has been traveling all over this country meeting voters and is giving this everything he has. **But none of that matters if we don 't hit our mid-quarter deadline goal of $250,000 by Sunday at midnight.**

That's why we need your help right now, Friend. [**Can you update your Quarter 4 Supporter Record with a gift of $100, $50, $25 or even $1 to help get us on track by Sunday at midnight?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/vvjbdkyzmghnrcrfnktbmnqcyynqzcdzbkjkhzcvmrkr_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

** Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
** Jeb 2016 Q4 Supporter Status: Pending
[Suggested donation: $1](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ylgryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwlcmfs_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wlgqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhlzfwl_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
*Our records are specific to the above email address and may not include recent or other offline donations.

Friend, with only 81 days until Iowa and 88 days until New Hampshire, we need your help today. Dad has what it takes to win, but needs the resources to compete and spread his message to voters.

[**We need your help to raise $250,000 by Sunday at midnight, or we risk falling short of our November budget.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/estljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcspdty_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

As Dad said at a rally in Tampa the other day, _" let's go win this."_

**He 's counting on supporters to help make that happen, but we need you to update your Quarter 4 Supporter Record with a gift of $100, $50, $25 or even $1 right now: [Jeb2016.com/Stand-With-Jeb/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mqygmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjqswtt_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thank you,

George P. Bush

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hqqrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdqmnsc_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Amnesty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend --

Ted Cruz says Marco Rubio is for amnesty. Marco Rubio says Ted Cruz agrees with him on immigration.

They’re both right. Which is why they’re both wrong!

Marco and Ted are my friends. I endorsed both of them for the Senate. But sometimes your friends make mistakes.

[**We all know that Marco Rubio wrote the Gang of 8’s amnesty bill. Ted Cruz says illegal immigrants should be able to stay in America indefinitely. Worse yet, Ted Cruz wants to double legal immigration and a 500% increase for corrupt visa programs that are being abused by big business to destroy American jobs.**](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/pro_worker_immigration_plan?sc=20151112amnesty&amount=2&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112amnesty&n=1)

You read that right...500%! [**Sadly, hear him say it in his own words.**](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/pro_worker_immigration_plan?sc=20151112amnesty&amount=2&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112amnesty&n=2)

I am the one candidate in this race who has never supported amnesty. Ten years ago I called out President Bush for trying to push amnesty down our throats and I have not stopped fighting for American workers.

But I need your help to make sure President Obama’s executive amnesty is repealed, our border is secured, and the flood of immigrant workers that are depressing wages is stopped!

**[This is an important fight that, with your support, we can win. Can you chip in $2 so we can keep standing up for American workers and their families?](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/pro_worker_immigration_plan?sc=20151112amnesty&amount=2&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112amnesty&n=3)**

Join us in the fight to support American workers, to end Obama’s power grab, and to secure our borders.

God bless,
Rick Santorum

---
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112amnesty&n=4) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112amnesty&n=5) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112amnesty&n=6), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112amnesty&n=7), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112amnesty&n=8).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112amnesty&n=9)

name: Bill Clinton
subject: I hope Hillary can count on you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you stand with Hillary? | Friend --

Hillary will be on that debate stage tomorrow making her case for how she's going to help millions of Americans -- and that's exactly who's going to get her to the White House.

This campaign won't be decided by a handful of billionaires writing checks; it will be won or lost on the actions of everyday people giving whatever they can to support this campaign.

**I hope she can count on you. She's working for all of us. Let's make sure she knows she has our support:** | [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks,

Bill

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=30&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjM5ODg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMjk5MjczS0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Will you stand with Hillary? | Friend -- Hillary will be on that debate stage tomorrow making her case for how she's going to help millions of Americans -- and that's exactly who's going to get her to the White House. This campaign won't be decided by a handful of billionaires writing checks; it will be won or lost on the actions of everyday people giving whatever they can to support this campaign. I hope she can count on you. She's working for all of us. Let's make sure she knows she has our support: | Thanks, Bill Did someone forward this email to you? | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit . Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click to receive less email and click to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on , , and . Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español . If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. ! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. name: Claire Sandberg, Bernie 2016
subject: Show up for Bernie in Silver Spring
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
We have a simple plan to win the primary and the election for Bernie. It's going to work, but only if you show up to the events that local organizers have planned in your community. They're waiting for you -- please don't let them down.
**Thousands of Bernie volunteers have planned activities nationwide -- find out what events happening in your community and RSVP today:**
**[Find Events](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27b6/43f17890/5076ba53/621e8a07/540974830/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=E&eventtype=D&eventtype=B&daterange=all-events&sort=distance")**
**You can also just RSVP to the Bernie event this weekend that is nearest you: **
**What:** KENSINGTON / CHEVY CHASE debate watch party in Kensington
**Where:** Kensington Grove
3200 Plyers Mill Road
Kensington, MD 20895
**When:** Saturday, November 14th
8:30 pm EST
**[RSVP to Attend](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vw2x)**
It's up to all of us together. Bernie really can become president -- we just need to show up!
It's an honor to be working with you in this movement. See you this weekend!
Claire Sandberg
Digital Organizing Director
Bernie 2016
P.S. If you can't make it to an event during our Week of Action, [**support our organizing efforts by making a contribution to our campaign today.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27b6/43f17890/5076ba53/621e8a04/540974830/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/event-contribute?refcode=em151113attend-c")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27b6/43f17890/5076ba53/621e8a05/540974830/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27b6/43f17890/5076ba53/621e8a02/540974830/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27b6/43f17890/5076ba53/621e8a03/540974830/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27b6/43f17890/5076ba53/621e8a00/540974830/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Adam Parkhomenko, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Fwd: You’ve got plans for Saturday night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Saturday: Come watch the debate! | Friend --

Just want to remind you that there's a debate watch party in Washington on Saturday night, and you should stop by! Debates are always more fun with friends, and this is the perfect opportunity to meet up with other members of Team Hillary.

**It will mean so much to Hillary to know that her supporters are in her corner on debate night. RSVP to join in:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/events/view/?id=825964/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Adam

\-----Forwarded Message-----
From: Marlon Marshall, HillaryClinton.com
Subject: You've got plans for Saturday night

Friend --

It's time for the second Democratic debate -- and you're invited to attend a watch party in your neighborhood!

Supporters all across the country will be watching, tweeting, and cheering for Hillary as she takes the stage on Saturday night. We want to make sure you're a part of it.

**[Here are the details:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**WHAT:** Debate Watch Party (DC for Hillary)
**WHEN:** Saturday, November 14th, 2015
07:00 pm - 11:00 pm
**WHERE:** 1620 I Street, NW
Washington, DC 20006

**[Yes, I'll be there.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[I can't make it, but I'll still volunteer! ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0) **
It means a lot to Hillary to know you're out there supporting her when she's up at that podium. She's going to make us feel proud to be a part of this team, and we're going to do our part to have her back on her big night.

Whether this is your first time being a part of a campaign or your tenth, joining a party in your city is a great (and easy) way to get involved in the organizing community. You'll meet other members of the team, have a good time, and learn a bit more about what you can do to elect Hillary.

**Can I tell Hillary you'll be watching? Just RSVP here:**
| | [**Reserve your spot**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Thanks,

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of States and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM5ODk2NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMzEwMjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
